package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_graph_walk_without_seen_set: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag recursive graph or tree walks that do not track visited nodes for cyclic or shared inputs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule501NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario501Negative(records []Rule501NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
